title: Enchants Plus
description: Adds 18 vanilla styled enchantments and 4 new curses!
body:
## DESCRIPTION This data pack aims to add new enchantments that feel vanilla and spice up the game! It adds 18 enchantments, 4 new curses and also modifies 3 vanilla enchantments.



Descriptions: (usage/supported item/max level/obtaining)

Enchantments ### Breeze Burst **Supported Items:** Bow
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** as enchanted books in trial chamber normal vaults, librarian trades
**Description**: Makes shot arrows spawn a wind charge upon impact with a block. Useful as a renewable alternative to wind charges. ### Crab's Touch **Supported Items:** Tools/Shears
**Max Level:** 3
**Found:** In shipwrecks, buried treasure, Ocean ruins, and trail ruins; librarian trades
**Description**: Increases your block interaction reach, allowing you to break blocks from up to 7.5 blocks away with level 3. You can also put a tool enchanted with crab's touch in your offhand to place blocks from far away. ### Gluttony **Supported Items:** tools/sword/shears
**Max Level:** 3
**Found:** in enchantment table; librarian trades
**Description**: Puts mined blocks directly into your inventory instead of dropping them as items. Level 2 works with crabs touch's extended range and level 3 also collects xp. ### Graviole **Supported Items:** elytra
**Max Level:** 3
**Found:** in end city loot chests
**Description**: Makes your elytra resist gravity which increases flight duration but also prevents you from using gravity to accelerate yourself, causing slower flight speed. ### Ice Aspect **Supported Items:** Sword
**Max Level:** 2
**Found:** guaranteed spawn in ancient city ice box chests, trial chamber normal vaults
**Description**: Has 10% chance with level 1 and 20% chance with level 2 to freeze enemies for 3 seconds, making them immobile. Players are still able to move their camera and fight back while frozen. Incompatible with fire aspect and websnare. ### Kinetic Protection **Supported Items:** Helmet
**Max Level:** 4
**Found:** enchantment table, random loot, villager trades
**Description**: Protects you from elytra's kinetic damage. ### Luminousity **Supported Items:** Chestplate
**Max Level:** 3
**Found:** enchantment table; villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Makes you emit a light level of 5 with level 1, 10 with level 2, and 15 with level 3. ### Outreach **Supported Items:** Sword
**Max Level:** 2
**Found:** enchantment table; villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Increases your attack reach to 4 blocks with level 2. Incompatible with Swift Strike. ### Precision **Supported Items:** Bow, Crossbow
**Max Level:** 2
**Found:** enchantment table (crossbow only); villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Reduces curve from projectile trajectory, increasing accuracy. Higher level increases range of effectiveness. ### Pyrolysis **Supported Items:** Pickaxes, axes, shovels
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** enchantment table; villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Auto smelts mined blocks, incompatible with fortune and silk touch. ### Retrieval **Supported Items:** Chestplate
**Max Level:** 4
**Found:** enchantment table; villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Arrows shot at you have a chance to go into your inventory, effectively letting you steal it. Potion effects from tipped arrows are used up and lost when stolen. Higher level has more chance for arrow to be retrieved with an 80% chance at level 4. ### Scorch Walker **Supported Items:** Boots
**Max Level:** 2
**Found:** villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Lava counterpart of frost walker, creates magma blocks for you to walk on lava. Also protects you from magma and powder snow damage. ### Skyguard **Supported Items:** Elytra
**Max Level:** 4
**Found:** end city loot chests
**Description**: Basically the protection enchantment but for elytras. ### Stride **Supported Items:** Leggings
**Max Level:** 3
**Found:** enchantment table; villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Allows you to step up full blocks without jumping as if they were stairs. ### Swift Strike **Supported Items:** Sword/axe
**Max Level:** 5
**Found:** enchantment table (sword only); villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Decreases attack cooldown. ### Toxic **Supported Items:** Bows/Crossbows
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** enchantment table (crossbow only); villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Makes arrows inflict poison on victim for 11 seconds. Undead mobs are immune to this enchantment. ### Vitality **Supported Items:** Chestplate
**Max Level:** 3
**Found:** enchantment table, villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Increases your max health to 13 hearts with level 3. ### Websnare **Supported Items:** Sword
**Max Level:** 2
**Found:** villager trades, random loot
**Description**: There's a chance a cobweb spawns under the victim, trapping them in it. Incompatible with fire aspect and ice aspect.
Curses ### Curse of Breaking **Supported Items:** All gear
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Items break 4x faster when they are cursed with this. ### Curse of Clumsiness **Supported Items:** Tools/weapons
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** villager trades, random loot
**Description**: When items enchanted with this curse are used to attack or mine, they have a chance to drop on the ground. ### Curse of Displacement **Supported Items:** Weapons
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Makes enemies teleport away sometimes. The algorithm will try to tp them behind you. ### Curse of Double Edge **Supported Items:** Weapons
**Max Level:** 1
**Found:** villager trades, random loot
**Description**: Weapons enchanted with this curse have a 40% chance to deal damage to you when used.
Modified Enchantments ### Power **Change**: Now works on crossbows ### Sharpness **Change**: Now works on tridents ### Silk touch **Change**: Now works on swords (for collecting cobwebs)
## INSTALLATION/UPDATE GUIDE ### Installation: - for datapack, go to your saves folder located here on Windows: `C:\Users\(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves` go to your world's folder, open the datapacks folder, put the zipped file, and restart your world - for mod, put the jar file in `c:\Users\(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods` and then launch the game ### Updating: - make sure your world is closed (if using mod, close the game) - locate the old datapack (or mod) and delete it - add the new datapack (or mod) - you're good to go! ## OTHER THINGS TO NOTE - get the [descriptions & translations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchants-plus-descriptions-translations) addon for in-game enchantment descriptions! - for feedback, bug reports, or other help, join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/kk3j3ct6xk) from the links section of this page!
